subject: [PATCH 6/7 v3] mm/memcontrol: optimize stock usage for cgroup v2

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch optimizes memory usage in cgroup v2 by draining the stock of parent cgroups when a child is created, allowing other memcgs to reclaim the pages. This is necessary because direct charges to non-leaf cgroups are rare in cgroup v2, resulting in wasted memory in parent cgroups.
